name: pickleball
title: /pickleball — Emmanuel's Pickleball App
preamble: When Angelo says `/pickleball`, switch context to Emmanuel's pickleball app workspace.

sections.heading: Workspace
sections.body:
- Directory: `~/EmmanuelWorkspace/`
- GitHub: `angelopaulferrer-ui` (exception — this workspace only)
- CLAUDE.md: `/Users/emmanuelpableo/EmmanuelWorkspace/CLAUDE.md`

sections.heading: Rules
sections.body:
- All work happens in `~/EmmanuelWorkspace/`
- Push to `angelopaulferrer-ui` only — never `vitalradarai-source`
- Do NOT apply EROS/Sean Plotkin rules here
- This is Emmanuel's personal project — treat it independently

sections.heading: On invocation
sections.body:
1. Confirm context is now the pickleball app
2. List the contents of `~/EmmanuelWorkspace/Pickleballgamemanagementapp/` to orient
3. Show the current git branch and last commit
4. Ask Angelo what he needs for the pickleball app

sections.heading: GitHub
sections.body:
- Remote: `https://github.com/angelopaulferrer-ui/Pickleballgamemanagementapp`
- Token stored in remote URL — push/pull works without account switching
- NEVER push to vitalradarai-source from this workspace
